programme.desc: An aspiring young detective gets the chance to emulate his idol, the famous Bengali investigator Feluda, when a long-forgotten case reemerges during the Durga Puja festival.

programme.desc: S1 , E562 : Baba Ramdev emphasises the importance of yoga and demonstrates various asanas and breathing exercises that enable one to lead a healthy and stress-free life.
